spec_gaps_implemented.requirement: Remediator writes [AI-Review] tasks → fresh dev-story via review_continuation
spec_gaps_implemented.implementation: core/gate_remediation.py: prepare_remediation_tasks() creates [AI-Review]-tagged tasks from FAIL categories; request_review_continuation() builds descriptor; route_gate_verdict() returns remediation_tasks and review_continuation in remediate action

spec_gaps_implemented.requirement: Remediator honors dev-story edit-authorization (only Tasks/Subtasks, Dev Agent Record, File List, Change Log, Status, baseline_commit)
spec_gaps_implemented.implementation: core/gate_remediation.py: EDITABLE_SECTIONS frozenset, validate_edit_authorization() raises EditAuthorizationError, write_remediation_to_story() enforces authorization

spec_gaps_implemented.requirement: Human takeover — all writes are BMAD-native (sprint-status + story file)
spec_gaps_implemented.implementation: core/gate_remediation.py: write_remediation_to_story() writes only to story file Tasks section using atomic writes; gate_status.py: park/resume/debt all write to _bmad/gate/ artifacts; no non-BMAD state mutations
spec_gaps_implemented.tests: tests/test_gate_remediation.py: WriteRemediationToStoryTests verifies story file content preserved

spec_gaps_implemented.requirement: Honors dev-story edit-authorization and code-review → review_continuation → [AI-Review] loop
spec_gaps_implemented.implementation: route_gate_verdict() returns review_continuation descriptor with trigger='gate-fail', cycle counter, and failing_categories for the orchestrator to drive the BMAD review_continuation loop

post_impl_findings.finding: Unknown verdicts silently fell through to remediate branch
post_impl_findings.fix: Added fail-closed guard: unrecognized overall values normalized to FAIL before routing

post_impl_findings.finding: No test for frontmatter-only story file (no ## sections)
Not wired into any production code path yet — only returns data in route_gate_verdict
post_impl_findings.fix: By design: orchestrator shell calls write_remediation_to_story; Python provides the data and the function

production_findings.finding: Non-atomic story file write via path.write_text()
shutil.rmtree without error handling — crash on Windows locked files leaves marker un-cleared
production_findings.fix: Wrapped in try/except OSError with pass to ensure marker is always cleared

production_findings.finding: Path.rename() not cross-platform (fails on Windows if dest exists)
production_findings.fix: Changed to os.replace() which is atomic and cross-platform; also derive dest from path.stem in invalidate_gates_for_target

production_findings.finding: No sanitization of gate_id/target_id from CLI args — path traversal risk
production_findings.fix: Added _SAFE_ID regex validation rejecting traversal patterns
Accepted — single-operator threat model per memory [[singleuser-threat-model]]

ruff_findings_fixed: tests/test_gate_cmd.py: removed unused import Path, removed 4 unused variable assignments
